reviews.review_description: wow the game is super fun but there should be a sandbox were you have all the items a must play for vr cooking fans. Have a good day

This game is good but but the time limit is kind of annoying!
 also because I have slow processing and it's hard to make it in time, 
this makes the game very stressful! can you add a setting that removes the time limit please.

Great game, I really enjoy the fun but relaxed atmosphere. Nice to be able to upgrade the food options after earning enough cash. Hopefully, there will be more music and maybe stock ordering in the future. I'd love to unlock and choose different sites to take the van to. I'd love to have a height control, too, as my kid loves to play (and squirt garlic sauce everywhere). The game has a lot of potential keep up the great work as this will be an excellent game. 5 stars for the price but could easily charge more with a little development.

This game is like real life I love that way you can make food a give 5 stars 



Hurry up get this game
